detaileddescription.para: If set, will return a point cloud instead of a triangle mesh.
If set, the system will compute the normals for the triangle vertices.
If set, the system will compute the confidence values.
If set, the system will planarize the returned mesh (planar regions will be smoothed out).
If set, the mesh skirt (overlapping area between two mesh blocks) will be removed.

briefdescription.para: If set, winding order of indices will be be changed from counter clockwise to clockwise. This could be useful for face culling process in different engines.

detaileddescription.para: Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Request flags for the meshing system.
Minimum Level of Detail (LOD) for the mesh.
Medium Level of Detail (LOD) for the mesh.
Maximum Level of Detail (LOD) for the mesh.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Level of detail of the block mesh.
Mesh request has succeeded.
Mesh request has failed.
Mesh request is pending.
There are partial updates on the mesh request.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Result of a mesh request.
Mesh has been created.
Mesh has been updated.
Mesh has been deleted.
Mesh is unchanged.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
State of a block mesh.
Request flags for the meshing system.
Level of detail of the block mesh.
Result of a mesh request.
State of a block mesh.
Mesh Settings for the underlying system.
Axis aligned bounding box for querying updated mesh info.
Representation of a mesh block.
Response structure for the mesh block info.
Request structure to get the actual mesh for a block.
Request structure to get the actual mesh for a set of blocks.
Final structure for a block mesh.
Result of a Mesh request. See MLMeshingGetMeshResult() for details.

Note that this will be the only function in the meshing API that will return MLResult_PermissionDenied. Trying to call the other functions with an invalid MLHandle will result in MLResult_InvalidParam.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The initial settings to be used for meshing.
Meshing Client was not created due to an invalid parameter.
Meshing Client was created successfully.
Perception System has not been started.
Missing required permission(s).
Meshing Client was not created due to an unknown error.
The client to destroy.
Meshing Client was not destroyed due to an invalid parameter.
Meshing Client was destroyed successfully.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the meshing settings with system defaults.

parameterdescription.para: The initial settings to be used for meshing.
Mesh Settings were not initialized due to an invalid parameter.
Mesh Settings were initialized successfully.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Update the meshing settings at runtime.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The updated settings to be used for meshing.
Mesh Settings were not updated due to an invalid parameter.
Mesh Settings were updated successfully.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Request the Mesh Info which includes CFUIDs and bounding extents of the blocks.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The region of interest for meshing.
The handle for the current request. Needs to be passed to query the result of the request.
Mesh info was not requested due to an invalid parameter.
Mesh Info was requested successfully.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Get the Result of a previous MeshInfo request.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The handle populated in a prev MLMeshingGetMeshInfo.
The final result which will be populated only if the result is successful.
Mesh Settings were not updated due to an invalid parameter.
Mesh Info was populated successfully.
Mesh Info is pending update.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Request the Mesh for all CFUIDs populated in request.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The request for meshes of interest.
The handle for the current request. Needs to be passed to query the result of the request.
Meshes were not requested due to an invalid parameter.
Meshes were requested successfully.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Get the Result of a previous Mesh request.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The handle populated in a prev MLMeshingGetMesh.
The final result which will be populated only if the result is successful.
Meshes were not updated due to an invalid parameter.
Meshes was populated successfully.
Meshes pending update.
Perception System has not been started.

briefdescription.para: Free resources created by the meshing APIS. Needs to be called whenever MLMeshingGetMeshInfoResult, MLMeshingGetMeshResult return a success.

parameterdescription.para: The handle to the created client.
The handle populated in a prev request.
Resources were not freed due to an invalid parameter.
Resources were freed successfully.
Perception System has not been started.
